title: Bug with `--isolation screen` mode
body: Logs of telegram bot: ``` [VERBOSE] /solve command received [VERBOSE] /solve passed all checks, executing... YError: Not enough arguments provided. Expected 1 but received 0. at h (/workspace/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/lib/node_modules/yargs-v-17.7.2/build/index.cjs:1:1667) at te.default (/workspace/.nvm/versions/node/v20.20.2/lib/node_modules/yargs-v-17.7.2/build/index.cjs:1:33556) at handleSolveCommand (file:///workspace/.bun/install/global/node_modules/@link-assistant/hive-mind/src/telegram-bot.mjs:975:46) at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5) [VERBOSE] /solve_queue found 4 running claude processes [VERBOSE] /solve_queue processes: [{"pid":"3345412","name":"claude"},{"pid":"3363438","name":"claude"},{"pid":"3377748","name":"claude"},{"pid":"3380929","name":"claude"}] [VERBOSE] /limits memory: 2877MB used of 11961MB total (24% used) [VERBOSE] /limits CPU load: 0.15 (1m), 0.30 (5m), 0.20 (15m), 6 CPUs, 5% used [VERBOSE] /solve_queue: CPU 5m load avg: 0.30, cpus: 6, usage: 5% [VERBOSE] /limits disk space: 48160MB free of 98122MB total (49% free) [VERBOSE] /limits-cache: Using cached Claude limits (TTL: 10 minutes) [VERBOSE] /limits-cache: Using cached GitHub limits [VERBOSE] Dynamically imported isolation-runner for per-command isolation [VERBOSE] Using isolation (screen), session: 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 /workspace/.bun/bin/$ [VERBOSE] isolation-runner: Using $ binary at: /workspace/.bun/bin/$ [VERBOSE] isolation-runner: Backend: screen, Session ID: 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 [VERBOSE] isolation-runner: $ --isolated screen --detached --session 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 -- solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/564 --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats [VERBOSE] isolation-runner: Output: │ session 6a176d96-59ee-4101-9212-f45147c0bc93 │ start 2026-04-08 07:28:04.135 │ │ isolation screen │ mode detached │ screen 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 │ $ solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/564 --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats ✓ │ finish 2026-04-08 07:28:04.201 │ duration 0.078s │ exit 0 │ │ isolation screen │ mode detached │ screen 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 │ │ log [VERBOSE] Session 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 tracked in memory (mode: isolation:screen) sandbox@5112d5f5aa82:~$ ``` In telegram: ``` /solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/564 —isolation screen ``` ``` ✅ Solve command started successfully! 📊 Session: 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 🔒 Isolation: screen Requested by: @drakonard URL: https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/564 🛠 Options: --isolation screen 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats 🔔 You will receive a notification when the session finishes. ``` At the same time: ``` sandbox@5112d5f5aa82:~$ $ --status 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 Error: No execution found with UUID: 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 sandbox@5112d5f5aa82:~$ $ --status 6a176d96-59ee-4101-9212-f45147c0bc93 6a176d96-59ee-4101-9212-f45147c0bc93 uuid 6a176d96-59ee-4101-9212-f45147c0bc93 status executed exitCode 0 command "solve https://github.com/link-assistant/hive-mind/pull/564 --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats" logPath /tmp/start-command-screen-1775633284135-r2ukw0.log startTime "2026-04-08T07:28:04.143Z" endTime "2026-04-08T07:28:04.202Z" workingDirectory /workspace shell /bin/sh platform linux options isolated screen isolationMode detached sessionName 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 user false keepAlive false useCommandStream false sandbox@5112d5f5aa82:~$ ``` Double check that is the root cause of ``` sandbox@5112d5f5aa82:~$ $ --status 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 Error: No execution found with UUID: 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0 ``` May be we should report a bug at https://github.com/link-foundation/start, as we should have a way to actually set predefined session ID, which later can be used to get status. Also the status is wrong, if I go to `screen -r 54fc440a-0f4b-44f6-8191-ea630b8f73d0` it continue to be executed. ``` sandbox@5112d5f5aa82:~$ screen -r 6a176d96-59ee-4101-9212-f45147c0bc93 There is no screen to be resumed matching 6a176d96-59ee-4101-9212-f45147c0bc93. ``` ``` status executed exitCode 0 ``` So that is wrong. All issues that Hive Mind is responsible for we should fix here, but all issues that are start-command related should be reported at https://github.com/link-foundation/start, so we can fix them all. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, find root causes of the problem, and propose possible solutions (including known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
